p.b: This code system defines the following properties for its concepts

tr.td: A string that provides additional detail pertinent to the use or understanding of the concept
The date at which the concept status was last changed
A code that indicates the status of the concept. Typical values are active, experimental, deprecated, and retired

True if the concept is not considered active - e.g. not a valid concept any more. Property type is boolean, default value is false. Note that the status property may also be used to indicate that a concept is inactive

div.p: This case-insensitive code system https://kip.rkkp.dk/fhir/CodeSystem/AssessmentType defines the following codes:

tr.td: Referred again beacause of behavioral problems
Referred again beacause of behavioral problems / Genhenvist pga. adfærdsforstyrrelser
Referred again beacause of dementia treatment
Referred again beacause of dementia treatment / Genhenvist pga. demensbehandling
Revisited for primary assessment / Omvisiteret til primær udredning
Patient interrupts investigation before diagnostic interview
Patient interrupts investigation before diagnostic interview / Patient afbryder udredning før diagnosesamtale

publisher.value: Sundhedsvæsenets Kvalitetsinstitut with Trifork Digital Health A/S

name.value: Sundhedsvæsenets Kvalitetsinstitut with Trifork Digital Health A/S

description.value: A string that provides additional detail pertinent to the use or understanding of the concept
The date at which the concept status was last changed
A code that indicates the status of the concept. Typical values are active, experimental, deprecated, and retired

True if the concept is not considered active - e.g. not a valid concept any more. Property type is boolean, default value is false. Note that the status property may also be used to indicate that a concept is inactive

display.value: Referred again beacause of behavioral problems

definition.value: Referred again beacause of behavioral problems / Genhenvist pga. adfærdsforstyrrelser

display.value: Referred again beacause of dementia treatment

definition.value: Referred again beacause of dementia treatment / Genhenvist pga. demensbehandling
Revisited for primary assessment / Omvisiteret til primær udredning

display.value: Patient interrupts investigation before diagnostic interview

definition.value: Patient interrupts investigation before diagnostic interview / Patient afbryder udredning før diagnosesamtale
